import React from 'react'; import Container from 'react-bootstrap/Container'; import Row from 'react-bootstrap/Row'; import Col from 'react-bootstrap/Col'; function About() { return (

About Us

Founded by racers (Dave Gregory and Jeff Berlin), Track and Rally was started to help provide racers the opportunity for more seat time. Our goal is to connect racers to more events, so they can improve their skills and gain exposure for sponsorships. Whether you are looking for an Autocross, Rallycross, Stage Rally, or Track Day, we have an event for you!

Dave Gregory's track Miata

Jeff Berlin's rally Subaru

) } export default About;
